scripts.build: node scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js node scripts/check-node-version.js && NODE_ENV=production node scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js turbo run build
scripts.build:app: cd skuberplus && node ../scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm build:app
scripts.build:core: cd packages/core && node ../../scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm build
scripts.build:dev: NODE_ENV=development node scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js turbo run build
scripts.build:dir: node scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm build:app dir
scripts.build:skuberplus: cd skuberplus && node ../scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm build
scripts.build:resources: cd skuberplus && node ../scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm build:resources
scripts.build:app:darwin:x64: cd skuberplus && TARGET_ARCH=x64 corepack pnpm build:app:darwin:x64
scripts.build:win:x64: cd skuberplus && corepack pnpm build:resources:win:x64 && corepack pnpm build:app:win:x64
scripts.electron-rebuild: cd skuberplus && node ../scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm electron-rebuild
scripts.clean: corepack pnpm -r clean && corepack pnpm -r build
scripts.clean:node_modules: corepack pnpm -r clean:node_modules && corepack pnpm dlx rimraf@6.0.1 node_modules
scripts.start: cd skuberplus && node ../scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm start
scripts.dev:full-log: node scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm run dev:orchestrate
scripts.dev:orchestrate: corepack pnpm run dev:bootstrap && corepack pnpm run dev:watch
scripts.dev:bootstrap: node scripts/build-logger.js start '@skuberplus/core' '선행 빌드 시작...' && corepack pnpm --filter "@skuberplus/core" run build && node scripts/build-logger.js success '@skuberplus/core' '선행 빌드 완료' || (node scripts/build-logger.js error '@skuberplus/core' '선행 빌드 실패' && exit 1)
scripts.dev:watch: corepack pnpm dlx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --names core,skuberplus --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "pnpm --filter @skuberplus/core run dev" "pnpm --filter ./skuberplus run dev"
scripts.dev:quiet: DAIVE_DEV_LOG_MODE=quiet node scripts/run-with-optional-arch.js corepack pnpm run dev:orchestrate:quiet
scripts.dev:orchestrate:quiet: corepack pnpm --reporter default run dev:bootstrap && corepack pnpm --reporter default run dev:watch:quiet
scripts.dev:watch:quiet: DAIVE_DEV_LOG_MODE=quiet corepack pnpm dlx concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[q:{name}]" --names core,skuberplus --prefix-colors "dim,dim" "pnpm --reporter default --filter @skuberplus/core run dev" "pnpm --reporter default --filter ./skuberplus run dev"
